ontology.foodon_gap_note: No FoodOn term exists specifically for martabak manis (Indonesian sweet stuffed pancake). The closest parent 'pancake food product' (FOODON_03315091) is used as the ontology anchor.
ontology.foodex2_gap_note: FoodEx2 does not have a specific code for martabak manis. A00LC (Pancakes and similar products) is the closest defensible parent category.
ontology.snomed_ct_gap_note: No SNOMED CT concept exists for martabak manis or Indonesian sweet stuffed pancake. SNOMED CT anchor omitted.

serving.natural_language_portion: One serving consists of 3 fun-sized pieces of Milo Ovo Crunch Martabak, weighing approximately 150 g in total, as sold by Smile Martabak at Funan, Singapore.

nutrient_source.title: Pancake, plain, prepared from recipe — USDA FoodData Central SR Legacy (NDB 18259); adapted with Milo and Ovo chocolate-malt topping composition estimated from Nestlé Milo product label (per 100 g) and Ovo chocolate powder label; martabak manis composition cross-referenced with FAO/INFOODS SEA Food Composition Table analogous sweet pancake entries
nutrient_source.organization: USDA Agricultural Research Service / FAO-INFOODS / Nestlé product label
nutrient_source.source_match_notes: No exact entry for Milo Ovo Crunch Martabak exists in any approved primary source. Nutrient values are estimated by combining: (1) USDA SR Legacy plain pancake base (NDB 18259) as the structural foundation; (2) Nestlé Milo powder label (per 100 g: energy 385 kcal, protein 6.2 g, fat 5.0 g, carbohydrate 75.6 g, sugar 46.0 g, sodium 160 mg) for the Milo component; (3) Ovo chocolate powder label for the Ovo component (similar profile to Milo); (4) added butter and condensed milk filling typical of martabak manis. The blended per-100 g estimate reflects a typical martabak manis with chocolate-malt topping at approximately 60% batter and 40% filling by weight. Values are moderate-confidence estimates.

gi_source.title: Pancake, made from packet mix — Glycemic Index Database, University of Sydney (GI = 67, glucose reference)
gi_source.source_match_notes: No direct GI measurement exists for Milo Ovo Crunch Martabak. The GI of 67 is taken from the University of Sydney GI Database entry for 'Pancake, made from packet mix' (GI = 67, medium category, glucose reference). Martabak manis is a thick sweet pancake with a similar flour-egg-sugar batter base; the high sugar and condensed milk filling are expected to maintain a medium GI. Glycemic load per serving calculated as: (GI × carbohydrate_g per serving) / 100 = (67 × 72.0 g carbohydrate in 150 g serving) / 100 = 48.2. Carbohydrate per serving = 48.0 g/100 g × 150 g = 72.0 g.

hypertension.key_factor: Sodium content (~315 mg per 150 g serving) and saturated fat from butter and condensed milk
hypertension.guidance: Individuals with hypertension should limit martabak manis consumption to occasional treats, as one 150 g serving contributes approximately 315 mg sodium and significant saturated fat, both of which can elevate blood pressure when consumed in excess.

type2_diabetes.key_factor: High refined carbohydrate and sugar load (72 g carbohydrate and ~33 g sugar per 150 g serving) with medium GI of 67
type2_diabetes.guidance: People with Type 2 Diabetes should treat Milo Ovo Crunch Martabak as an occasional indulgence only, as one 150 g serving delivers approximately 72 g of carbohydrate and 33 g of sugar with a medium glycemic index of 67, producing a high glycemic load of ~48 that will cause a significant postprandial blood glucose rise.

cardiovascular_disease.key_factor: Saturated fat (~8.25 g per serving) from butter and condensed milk, plus moderate cholesterol (~82.5 mg per serving)
cardiovascular_disease.guidance: Patients with cardiovascular disease should consume Milo Ovo Crunch Martabak sparingly, as the butter and condensed milk filling contribute approximately 8.25 g of saturated fat per 150 g serving, which exceeds one-third of the recommended daily saturated fat limit and may adversely affect LDL cholesterol levels.

llm_training.natural_language_description: Milo Ovo Crunch Martabak is a fun-sized variant of martabak manis, the beloved Indonesian thick sweet stuffed pancake, sold in a 3-piece portion (approximately 150 g) at Smile Martabak in Funan, Singapore. Martabak manis — also known as terang bulan in parts of Indonesia — is made from a leavened batter of wheat flour, eggs, sugar, baking powder, and yeast, cooked in a heavy cast-iron mould until thick and spongy on the inside with a lightly crisp base. The Milo Ovo Crunch variant is filled and topped with Nestlé Milo chocolate-malt powder, Ovo chocolate powder, butter, and condensed milk, creating a rich, sweet, and indulgent flavour profile with a soft, slightly chewy texture and a crunchy chocolate-malt topping. Milo and Ovo are iconic Southeast Asian chocolate-malt brands widely recognised in Singapore, Malaysia, and Indonesia, giving this martabak a nostalgic and regionally distinctive character. Nutritionally, each 150 g serving provides approximately 480 kcal, 72 g of carbohydrate, 33 g of sugar, 16.5 g of fat, and 9.75 g of protein. The high sugar and refined carbohydrate content, combined with a medium glycemic index of 67 and a glycemic load of approximately 48, make this a high-energy, high-GL treat that is not suitable for frequent consumption by individuals managing Type 2 Diabetes, hypertension, or cardiovascular disease. It is best enjoyed as an occasional indulgence. The dish is vegetarian and halal-certified in most Indonesian and Singaporean contexts.

confidence_reason: No exact entry for Milo Ovo Crunch Martabak exists in any approved primary nutritional database. Nutrient values are estimated by combining USDA SR Legacy plain pancake data with Nestlé Milo and Ovo product label data and typical martabak manis filling composition. GI is analogously estimated from the University of Sydney GI Database entry for packet-mix pancake (GI 67). Confidence is medium because the estimation methodology is transparent and defensible but not based on direct laboratory analysis of this specific product.
notes: 1. Food group corrected from 'Beverages' (as in input) to 'Snacks' — martabak manis is a solid sweet stuffed pancake, not a beverage. The 'Beverages' classification in the input appears to be a field survey platform tagging error. 2. Vitamin C is 0.0 — confirmed zero as this product contains no fruit or vegetable components that would contribute ascorbic acid; confirmed zero by product composition. 3. Vitamin B6, B12, folate, vitamin D, vitamin E, and selenium are reported as -1 as these micronutrients are not reported in the USDA SR Legacy pancake entry or the Milo/Ovo product labels used as the estimation basis; values are not reported in the source data. 4. GI set to 67 (medium) based on analogous University of Sydney GI Database entry for 'Pancake, made from packet mix'; glycemic load per serving = 48.2 calculated as (67 × 72.0 g carbohydrate per 150 g serving) / 100. 5. Serving size of 150 g (3 pieces) is preserved from the input record as stated by the restaurant. 6. Halal status is assumed based on the restaurant context (Smile Martabak, Indonesian cuisine); formal halal certification should be verified with the restaurant. 7. The food_name has been expanded from 'Milo Ovo Crunch (3pcs)' to 'Milo Ovo Crunch Martabak (3 pieces)' to provide a canonical English identity that clearly identifies the food type. 8. monounsaturated_fat_g, polyunsaturated_fat_g, trans_fat_g, potassium_mg, calcium_mg, iron_mg, cholesterol_mg, vitamin_a_mcg_rae, vitamin_b1_thiamine_mg, vitamin_b2_riboflavin_mg, vitamin_b3_niacin_mg, phosphorus_mg, magnesium_mg, zinc_mg, and water_g are estimated from USDA SR Legacy and Milo label data and carry moderate uncertainty.
